VAL-DASHPROD-001.evidence: Product list table at /dashboard/products showed columns: Name, GTIN, Serial Number, Status (color-coded badge), Created date. Product FT1-Test Product was displayed correctly.

VAL-DASHPROD-002.evidence: With no products, /dashboard/products showed an empty state message. Table was not rendered. Screenshot captured.

VAL-DASHPROD-004.evidence: Clicking a product row navigated to /dashboard/products/[id] as expected.

VAL-DASHPROD-006.evidence: Form at /dashboard/products/new showed Name, GTIN, Serial Number, Category (dropdown), Description fields. All initially empty.

VAL-DASHPROD-007.evidence: Entering invalid GTIN (wrong check digit) showed inline validation error before form submission. No API request was made.

VAL-DASHPROD-008.evidence: Submitting form with empty required fields showed inline validation errors for Name, GTIN, and Serial Number.

VAL-DASHPROD-009.evidence: Submitting valid form data (GTIN: 00012345678905, serial: FT1-SN-001) called POST /products and redirected to /dashboard/products/[id].

VAL-DASHPROD-010.evidence: Clicking 'Cancel' returned to /dashboard/products without making an API request.

VAL-DASHPROD-019.evidence: Sidebar 'Products' link navigated to /dashboard/products and was highlighted as active route on /dashboard/products pages.

VAL-DASHPROD-020.evidence: Submitting duplicate GTIN+serial triggered 409 Conflict error. Form displayed inline error message without navigating away.
